settings.title: SwitchMaster
settings.sensorEmpty: No motion sensors configured yet. Click "Add sensor" to start.
settings.intro: Configure IKEA BILRESA remotes. SwitchMaster automatically creates the Homey Flows behind the scenes.
settings.patHint: Required to create Flows. Generate one at my.homey.app → Settings → API Keys (with Flow access) and paste it here. Stored locally on your Homey.
settings.empty: No remotes configured yet. Click "Add remote" to start.
settings.dualHint: Dimmer: top dims up, bottom dims down. On / Off: top turns on, bottom turns off. Two toggles: each button toggles its assigned light.
settings.dialHint: Each dial slot dims on scroll and toggles on press.
